diagnosis.reason: A rank-tail follow-up is diagnostically supported only when at least one fixed rule passes the prior calibration screen and has positive base and paired-stress economics on the consumed interval.

method.purpose: Test whether Round 53 global rank correlation survives in the executable top tail after removing the positive-EV requirement.
method.replay_score_transform: Selected raw scores are converted to positive distance above the calibration threshold solely to satisfy the replay API contract.
